summary: Completed testing of Admin Dashboard with charts and password reset flow. All 11 backend tests pass (100%). Fixed a bug where Top Products showed 'Unknown' instead of actual product names. All charts (Revenue, Bids, Users, Auction Status Pie, Top Products) render correctly using recharts library.

fixed.issue: Top Products showing 'Unknown' for all products because auctions were fetched without product data enrichment
fixed.fix: Added products_map lookup to fetch product names by product_id

issues: Console warnings about recharts width/height being -1 (cosmetic, charts still render correctly)

features_tested: Revenue by day (7 days) - AreaChart data
Bids by day (7 days) - BarChart data
Users by day (7 days) - LineChart data
Top products by bids - List data
Password reset flow with MongoDB storage (no in-memory store)

pages_tested: Admin Dashboard (/admin) - All charts rendering correctly
Login page - Admin and customer login working
charts_verified: Umsatz (7 Tage) - Revenue AreaChart with gradient fill
Gebote (7 Tage) - Bids BarChart with yellow bars
Neue Nutzer (7 Tage) - Users LineChart with purple line
Top Produkte - List showing product names with bid counts

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Top Products in /api/admin/stats/detailed now correctly fetches product names using products_map lookup instead of relying on embedded product data in auctions
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed top_products query in get_detailed_stats endpoint (line ~1205-1215)
/app/tests/test_admin_dashboard_charts.py - Created comprehensive test suite for admin dashboard charts
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test accounts and data

mocked_apis.payments_tab: Admin Payments tab shows mock data
mocked_apis.logs_tab: Admin Logs tab shows mock data
mocked_apis.email_sending: Password reset code returned in API response (demo_code field)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Dashboard with recharts is fully functional. All 5 chart types (AreaChart, BarChart, LineChart, PieChart, Top Products list) render correctly. Password reset uses MongoDB only (password_reset_codes collection). The in-memory store was already removed. Test file /app/tests/test_admin_dashboard_charts.py contains 11 tests covering the detailed stats endpoint.
